title: CRIMINAL JUSTICE MAJOR: A Day In My Life
body:
Her calmly saying her day: I have 30 minutes to leave, I have to walk and feed me dog, get ready, and finish this assignment.

How! I would be freaking out that I would be late if I only had 30 minutes to do all that!

title: College Day in My Life as a Criminal Justice Major at Sam Houston State University
body: Hey!! I’m transferring in the fall as a CJ major ! My registration starts Tuesday & I’m stressing out bc all of the classes I wanted are full .
